titleStmt.title: SII 18.165: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 165. (B.K. No. 127 of 1933-34.) BIJĀPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription, which contains numerous scribal errors, is dated in the 8th year of the reign of Chālukya-Chakravartin Tribhuvanamalladēva, Tāraṇa, Kārtika s11u. Daśami, Monday. Among the kings who had the appellation Tribhuvanamalla, Sōmēśvara IV had the title Chālukya-Chakravartin. The cyclic year Tāraṇa did not occur in his reign. The incorrect date and the faulty engraving raise a doubt regarding the genuineness of the record.
It registers a grant of land to god Nārasiṁhadēva of Vijayapura, made by Dēvarasa, the Mahāprabhu of that place. The gift was made in the presence of the Mahājanas and others of the place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmatu caḷukkecakravartti tribhūva
namalladēvaraya vijayajyōdaya
da variṣada 8 neya taraṇasaṁvacharada ka
rttika sudha dasami sōmavaradaṁdu śrīma
tu rayarājadhani dakṣiṇavaraṇasi vijeyapura
da śrīnārasiṁhadēvargge vijeyapurada mahā
prabhu hubinā hiriya dēvarasaru taṁma ja
kkimayanahaḷinā staḷadoḷage taṁma rā
madēvana kkeyiṁ teṁkalu mattaru 10 matta
rāmadēvana kkeyiṁ baḍagalu mattaru 8 Aṁtu mattaru
18 taṁma vurāḍikkeya paḍuvaṇa maḷavadoḷage taṁ
ma ramadēvana Arddhabhāgada maḷavadiṁ paḍuvalu yida
taṁma bhagada Arddhamaḷava yiṁtinitu mūkṣahi
ṭu boṭu Aṣṭabhōgatējasamya vuṁbaḷi beṁbaḷi
Akṣīṇi Āgami samasta samya sahita Ā śrīnārasiṁ
hadēvargga haṁnibaru voḍeyaruṁ Āsēsamahaja
nāṁgaḷuṁ taṁma rāmadēvana yiṁtinibara samakṣa
diṁ Ā hubinā dēvarasaru dharapurvvakavaggi biṭaru
maṁgaḷa mahaśrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 18.165 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
